name: Responsible Consumption and Production
description: Ensure sustainable consumption and production patterns

targets.name: Sustainable Consumption and Production Programmes
targets.description: Implement the 10-Year Framework of Programmes on Sustainable Consumption and Production Patterns

targets.name: Sustainable Management of Natural Resources
targets.description: By 2030, achieve the sustainable management and efficient use of natural resources

targets.name: Reduce Food Waste
targets.description: By 2030, halve per capita global food waste at the retail and consumer levels
procurement_criteria: Food waste reduction measures in catering tenders

targets.name: Chemicals and Waste Management
targets.description: By 2020, achieve environmentally sound management of chemicals and all wastes throughout their life cycle
procurement_criteria: Compliance with Hazardous Waste Management Rules

targets.name: Reduce Waste Generation
targets.description: By 2030, substantially reduce waste generation through prevention, reduction, recycling and reuse
procurement_criteria: Construction and demolition waste recycling targets
Circular economy principles in material selection

targets.name: Corporate Sustainability Reporting
targets.description: Encourage companies to adopt sustainable practices and to integrate sustainability information into their reporting cycle

targets.name: Sustainable Public Procurement
targets.description: Promote public procurement practices that are sustainable, in accordance with national policies and priorities
procurement_criteria: Green procurement criteria in bid evaluation
Life Cycle Costing (LCC) in bid evaluation
BEE star rating requirements for equipment

targets.name: Awareness for Sustainable Development
targets.description: By 2030, ensure that people everywhere have the relevant information and awareness for sustainable development

targets.name: Scientific and Technological Capacity
targets.description: Support developing countries to strengthen their scientific and technological capacity for sustainable consumption and production

targets.name: Sustainable Tourism
targets.description: Develop and implement tools to monitor sustainable development impacts for sustainable tourism
procurement_criteria: Environmental impact monitoring for tourism projects

targets.name: Rationalize Fossil-Fuel Subsidies
targets.description: Rationalize inefficient fossil-fuel subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption
